## Findings
- [ ] **[Coverage/WARN] Server package coverage at 38.2%**
  - **Status quo:** `internal/server` has 38.2% line coverage. The package handles REST API, SSE, and embedded board serving.
  - **Likely cause:** New auth middleware, device registry, and run handlers added in v0.2.0 have limited test coverage.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add unit tests for auth middleware, device registry CRUD, and run handler edge cases.
  - **Uncovered:** `internal/server` — multiple handler functions (relocate by anchor when implementing)
  - **Effort/Impact:** Medium effort / Medium impact

- [ ] **[Coverage/WARN] Config package coverage at 45.6%**
  - **Status quo:** `internal/config` has 45.6% line coverage. Handles cycle persistence, model resolution, and discovery.
  - **Likely cause:** Model resolver fallback chains and discovery logic have complex branching.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add tests for model resolver edge cases (missing overrides, invalid categories).
  - **Uncovered:** `internal/config` — resolver fallback branches (relocate by anchor when implementing)
  - **Effort/Impact:** Low effort / Medium impact

## Non-issues
- `internal/client/` is SwiftUI (separate build system) — not measured by `go test`.
- `web/` is embedded static assets — not applicable for unit test coverage.
